languages.text: "Зарков не узнать, Ваше Сиятельство!" {n}Тон Куравича полон неподдельного восхищения.{/n} "Каких только чудес мы не насмотрелись: люмены, инфопластины, черепа говорящие... И главное — порядок, довольствие! Видно, приглянулись мы Богу-Императору, заслужили прощение".

traits.locale_text: "Зарков не узнать, Ваше Сиятельство!" {n}Тон Куравича полон неподдельного восхищения. {/n} "Каких только чудес мы не насмотрелись: люмены, инфопластины, черепа говорящие... И главное — порядок, довольствие! Видно, приглянулись мы Богу-Императору, заслужили прощение".

languages.text: "Zarkov has changed beyond recognition, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! {n}Kuravich's voice chimes with heartfelt admiration.{/n} "The wonders we've seen: lumens, data-slates, even talking skulls... And, above all — order and rations! It's clear the God-Emperor has taken a liking to us. We've finally earned His forgiveness."
languages.original_text: "Зарков не узнать, Ваше Сиятельство!" {n}Тон Куравича полон неподдельного восхищения.{/n} "Каких только чудес мы не насмотрелись: люмены, инфопластины, черепа говорящие... И главное — порядок, довольствие! Видно, приглянулись мы Богу-Императору, заслужили прощение".

traits.locale_text: "Zarkov is unrecognizable, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! {n}Kuravich's voice rings with heartfelt admiration.{/n} "The wonders we've seen: lumens, data-slates, even talking skulls... And above all — order and rations! It's clear the God-Emperor has taken a liking to us. We've finally earned His forgiveness."

"Zarkov is unrecognizable, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! {n}Kuravich's voice rings with heartfelt admiration.{/n} "The wonders we've seen: lumens, data-slates, even talking skulls... And above all — order and rations! It's clear the God-Emperor has taken a liking to us. We've finally earned His forgiveness."

"Zarkov has changed beyond recognition, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! {n}Kuravich's voice chimes with heartfelt admiration.{/n} "The wonders we've seen: lumens, data-slates, even talking skulls... And, above all — order and rations! It's clear the God-Emperor has taken a liking to us. We've finally earned His forgiveness."

"Zarkov has changed beyond recognition, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! {n}Kuravich's voice chimes with heartfelt admiration.{/n} "The wonders we've seen: lumens, data-slates, even talking skulls... And, above all — order and rations! It's clear the God-Emperor has taken a liking to us. We've finally earned His forgiveness."

languages.text: “扎尔科夫已经改头换面了，大人！”{n}库拉维奇的声音里透着由衷的钦佩。{/n}“我们见到了好些个神奇的东西：流明灯，数据板，甚至还有会说话的头骨……最关键的是，我们有了秩序和口粮！神皇终于眷顾我们了。我们总算赢得了祂的宽恕。”
languages.original_text: "Zarkov has changed beyond recognition, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! {n}Kuravich's voice chimes with heartfelt admiration.{/n} "The wonders we've seen: lumens, data-slates, even talking skulls... And, above all — order and rations! It's clear the God-Emperor has taken a liking to us. We've finally earned His forgiveness."

traits.locale_text: “扎尔科夫已经改头换面了，大人！”{n}库拉维奇的声音里透着由衷的钦佩。{/n}“我们见到了好些个神奇的东西：流明灯，数据板，甚至还有会说话的头骨……最关键的是，我们有了秩序和口粮！神皇终于眷顾我们了。我们总算赢得了祂的宽恕。”

languages.text: "Zarkov tanınmaz hâle geldi {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri!" {n}Kuravich'in sesi, içten bir hayranlıkla çınlıyor.{/n} "Lümenler, databelalar, hatta konuşan kafatasları gibi mucizelere şahit olduk... Her şeyden önemlisiyse düzen ve erzak gördük! Tanrı İmparator'un sevdiği kuluymuşuz. Sonunda O'nun bağışlamasını mazhar olduk."
languages.original_text: "Zarkov has changed beyond recognition, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! {n}Kuravich's voice chimes with heartfelt admiration.{/n} "The wonders we've seen: lumens, data-slates, even talking skulls... And, above all — order and rations! It's clear the God-Emperor has taken a liking to us. We've finally earned His forgiveness."

traits.locale_text: "Zarkov tanınmaz hâle geldi {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri!" {n}Kuravich'in sesi, içten bir hayranlıkla çınlıyor.{/n} "Lümenler, databelalar, hatta konuşan kafatasları gibi mucizelere şahit olduk... Her şeyden önemlisiyse düzen ve erzak gördük! Tanrı İmparator'un sevdiği kuluymuşuz. Sonunda O'nun bağışlamasını mazhar olduk."

languages.text: « Zarkov est méconnaissable, Votre Seigneurie ! {n}s'exclame Kuravich d'une voix empreinte d'admiration sincère.{/n} Vous nous avez fait découvrir toutes sortes de merveilles : les lumens, les plaques de données, même des crânes qui parlent... Et surtout, vous nous avez apporté de l'ordre et des rations ! Il est évident que l'Empereur-Dieu s'est pris de sympathie pour nous. Nous avons enfin gagné Son pardon. »
languages.original_text: "Zarkov has changed beyond recognition, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! {n}Kuravich's voice chimes with heartfelt admiration.{/n} "The wonders we've seen: lumens, data-slates, even talking skulls... And, above all — order and rations! It's clear the God-Emperor has taken a liking to us. We've finally earned His forgiveness."

traits.locale_text: « Zarkov est méconnaissable, Votre Seigneurie ! {n}s'exclame Kuravich d'une voix empreinte d'admiration sincère.{/n} Vous nous avez fait découvrir toutes sortes de merveilles : les lumens, les plaques de données, même des crânes qui parlent... Et surtout, vous nous avez apporté de l'ordre et des rations ! Il est évident que l'Empereur-Dieu s'est pris de sympathie pour nous. Nous avons enfin gagné Son pardon. »

languages.text: «¡Zarkov está irreconocible, mi{mf|lord|lady}!». {n}La voz de Kuravich está llena de admiración sincera.{/n} «Hemos visto maravillas. Lumens, tablillas de datos, hasta cráneos parlantes... Y, además, ¡tenemos orden y comida! Claramente, el Dios Emperador nos favorece. Por fin nos hemos ganado Su perdón».
languages.original_text: "Zarkov has changed beyond recognition, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! {n}Kuravich's voice chimes with heartfelt admiration.{/n} "The wonders we've seen: lumens, data-slates, even talking skulls... And, above all — order and rations! It's clear the God-Emperor has taken a liking to us. We've finally earned His forgiveness."

traits.locale_text: «¡Zarkov está irreconocible, mi{mf|lord|lady}!». {n}La voz de Kuravich está llena de admiración sincera.{/n} «Hemos visto maravillas. Lumens, tablillas de datos, hasta cráneos parlantes... Y, además, ¡tenemos orden y comida! Claramente, el Dios Emperador nos favorece. Por fin nos hemos ganado Su perdón».

languages.text: "Zarkov ist nicht wiederzuerkennen, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}! {n}In Kuravichs Stimme schwingt aufrichtige Bewunderung mit.{/n} "Die Wunder, die wir gesehen haben: Lumen, Datablöcke, sprechende Schädel ... Und über allem ... Ordnung und Rationen! Es ist offensichtlich, dass der Gottimperator Gefallen an uns gefunden hat. Endlich haben wir Seine Vergebung verdient."
languages.original_text: "Zarkov has changed beyond recognition, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! {n}Kuravich's voice chimes with heartfelt admiration.{/n} "The wonders we've seen: lumens, data-slates, even talking skulls... And, above all — order and rations! It's clear the God-Emperor has taken a liking to us. We've finally earned His forgiveness."

traits.locale_text: "Zarkov ist nicht wiederzuerkennen, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}! {n}In Kuravichs Stimme schwingt aufrichtige Bewunderung mit.{/n} "Die Wunder, die wir gesehen haben: Lumen, Datablöcke, sprechende Schädel ... Und über allem ... Ordnung und Rationen! Es ist offensichtlich, dass der Gottimperator Gefallen an uns gefunden hat. Endlich haben wir Seine Vergebung verdient."

languages.text: 「ザルコフはもはや別人です、御{mf|主|女}様！」{n}クラビッチの言葉は、心からの敬意に満ちています。{/n}「我々が目にした奇跡の数々、ルメン、データスレート、話す頭蓋骨さえ…そして何より、秩序と食料！神皇帝は我々を気に入ってくれたのでしょう。ついに、我々は彼の許しを得たのです。」
languages.original_text: "Zarkov has changed beyond recognition, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! {n}Kuravich's voice chimes with heartfelt admiration.{/n} "The wonders we've seen: lumens, data-slates, even talking skulls... And, above all — order and rations! It's clear the God-Emperor has taken a liking to us. We've finally earned His forgiveness."

traits.locale_text: 「ザルコフはもはや別人です、御{mf|主|女}様！」{n}クラビッチの言葉は、心からの敬意に満ちています。{/n}「我々が目にした奇跡の数々、ルメン、データスレート、話す頭蓋骨さえ…そして何より、秩序と食料！神皇帝は我々を気に入ってくれたのでしょう。ついに、我々は彼の許しを得たのです。」
